Playtest: 10 runs completes, verifier invariants core loop
tasks.notes: RESULT=FAIL. 10 invariants PASS, 1 FAIL (INV-11 double increment cards_played). 1 CRITICAL bug found (BUG-CARDS-PLAYED-FIX: double increment via ref mutation + StoreRun both incrementing), 1 HIGH bug (BUG-ORPHANED-PIPELINE: process_card orphaned). 2 MEDIUM bugs. Life/rep/MOS invariants all pass. New tasks BUG-CARDS-PLAYED-FIX and BUG-ORPHANED-PIPELINE added at priority=0. Report: test_reports/S1-CORE-TEST_2026-04-12.json

tasks.title: FIX CRITICAL: Supprimer double increment cards_played dans resolve_card()
tasks.notes: Removed lines 482-484 from merlin_card_system.gd (comment + card_index + cards_played increments). StoreRun.resolve_choice() remains the single source of truth for cards_played increment. Verified by grep: no increment in resolve_card(). Fix prevents MOS hard_max triggering at ~25 real cards.

tasks.title: FIX HIGH: Supprimer process_card() orphelin + ajouter pacing recovery dans StoreRun
tasks.notes: Deleted process_card() (9125 chars) from merlin_effect_engine.gd via Python regex. Added pacing recovery (+5 HP if 0 < life < 20) to StoreRun.resolve_choice() before return. Set LIFE_ESSENCE_DRAIN_PER_CARD=0 (director decision q-20260412-001). Pacing recovery subject to director q-20260412-005.

tasks.title: Validation LLM: generer 10 cartes, valider JSON + effets
tasks.notes: TEST cycle: 10 scenarios analyzed. FAIL: 1 HIGH bug (BUG-FACTION-OVERFLOW — faction keyword auto-tag overflow causes _validate_card failure on ~40-60% of Celtic cards). 1 LOW bug (dead constant GENERATION_TIMEOUT_MS). 3/3 regression checks PASS (cards_played fix, process_card removal, drain=0). New task BUG-FACTION-OVERFLOW-FIX created at priority 1. Timeout/fallback/JSON repair all PASS. Report: test_reports/S1-LLM-VALIDATE_2026-04-12.json

tasks.title: Fix: faction keyword auto-tag overflow silently failing _validate_card
tasks.notes: Fixed in merlin_llm_adapter.gd _wrap_text_as_card(): added faction_tagged bool flag to break outer faction loop after first match, added size guard (< 3 effects). Frequency was 40-60% of Celtic cards. Now at most 1 ADD_REPUTATION per card.

tasks.title: Supprimer dead code merlin_constants.gd (ELEMENTS, ESSENCE_*, FLUX_*)
tasks.notes: AUDIT: All listed dead constants (ELEMENTS, ESSENCE_DROP_*, ESSENCE_ANCHOR_CARDS, ESSENCE_BASE_REWARDS, ESSENCE_VICTORY_BONUS, ESSENCE_CHUTE_BONUS, ESSENCE_MINIGAME_BONUS, ESSENCE_OGHAM_BONUS, ESSENCE_FACTION_BONUS, FLUX_*, RUN_TYPOLOGIES, DC_BASE, DC_DIFFICULTY_LABELS, ARCHETYPE_DC_BONUS, BOND_TIERS) were already removed in prior Triade cleanup cycles. OGHAM_STARTER_SKILLS and CardOption were listed for removal but are actively used by 8+ files — kept. Bonus: removed dead GENERATION_TIMEOUT_MS from merlin_llm_adapter.gd (LOW bug from S1-LLM-VALIDATE).

tasks.title: Nettoyer merlin_store.gd dead state (essence, bestiole, ogham_fragments)
tasks.notes: AUDIT: No dead meta state keys found in merlin_store.gd. 'life_essence' is the live life-bar state (not old Essence system). No bestiole, ogham_fragments, liens, gloire_points, bestiole_evolution keys. No _init_triade_run/_resolve_triade_choice methods. All already cleaned in prior cycles.

tasks.title: Renommer TRIADE_ action dispatch prefix dans store + callers
tasks.notes: AUDIT: No TRIADE_ action dispatch prefixes found in merlin_store.gd or merlin_game_controller.gd. Only remaining TRIADE_ references are in test_fallback_pool.gd FORBIDDEN_EFFECT_TYPES array — a test assertion that these old effects must NOT appear in cards, which is legitimate and correct.

tasks.title: Aligner 18 Oghams sur bible v2.4 (7 effets incorrects)
tasks.notes: AUDIT: All 18 Oghams verified correct. 6/6 named corrections already in place: duir=heal_immediate(12), onn=add_biome_currency(10), nuin=replace_worst_option, quert=heal_immediate(8), ruis=heal_and_cost(heal:18,currency_cost:5), saille=currency_and_heal(currency:8,heal:3).
